title: Invisible Item Frame
description: this pack makes item frames invisible so that you can build better
body: ## [![](https://i.ibb.co/pKT8ygc/eeee.png)]()    You have to unzip the file.   I also recommend downloading: Enhanced Item Frame   [![](https://i.imgur.com/RqSx690.jpg)]()   ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/409/282/2021-11-21_09.png)   ## **![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/372/262/2021-06-16_00.png)**   ## **![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/359/679/310/172/2021-04-28_20.png)**
